chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Date N0.0-319 0{ 2023 with signature of Judge FOf of main ca5e 12.12.2023 Mr. Abdul Pirzada, Advocate for the Mr Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Petitioner ١٢، Athar Respondents No 4 to 6 Hussain Pathan, AAG 7٥4 4 4 4 ٦٧ ٨1 Learned Counsel f0r the Respondents submits that entir٤ grievance has been redressed except an amount of Rs,10479O/- 20 days drawn salary in excess of her commutation gratuity He further submits that this issue would be looked into and the decision would be communicated to the petitioner as and when ١5 ma٥٤ 4١ ٨٥f ١t i5 found to be withheld without legal authority and that without any rhyme or reason such amount has been deducted the same would be paid to the petitioner Accordingly in view of above, this petition disposed of having served out Its purpose COURT Order hearing Naeem Agha
